prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ce039d91`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `ce039d91`. The rule is: recolor a gray `5` to blue `1` iff its horizontally mirrored cell in the same row is also gray. I used the Opus hint because it matched the official examples, and I discarded the Sonnet hint because it incorrectly described rectangle detection; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ce039d91/notes.md).

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ce039d91/verifier.py#L4) and the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ce039d91/generator.py#L102). The generator explicitly builds a symmetric half-grid signal, mirrors it across the vertical center, and then adds asymmetric gray singleton/short-fragment noise so the family stays close to the official 10x10 distribution. No new primitive was added. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ce039d91/__init__.py).

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `pass ce039d91: 5/5`
- Generated examples: `pass ce039d91: 1000/1000`
